# Alcoa Acquires South32 for $5.6 Billion

*MarketFlock Lead Analyst | June 30, 2026*

---

## 🎯 The Intelligence Signal
Alcoa Corp. has agreed to buy South32 Ltd.’s bauxite, alumina and aluminum assets in Australia, Brazil and South Africa in a deal valued at as much as $5.6 billion, cementing its position among the world’s largest aluminum producers as long-term demand strengthens.
